originalTitle: Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra are $70 off, marking a new low price
summary: If you’re planning on traveling anytime soon, Bose’s second-generation QuietComfort Ultra headphones are a great companion for long flights and train rides. Not only do they offer excellent noise cancellation, but they also retain the foldable design of their predecessor, making them easy to pack in a carry-on. They’re even easier to recommend today, now […]
content: If you’re planning on traveling anytime soon, Bose’s second-generation QuietComfort Ultra headphones are a great companion for long flights and train rides. Not only do they offer excellent noise cancellation, but they also retain the foldable design of their predecessor, making them easy to pack in a carry-on. They’re even easier to recommend today, now that they’ve dropped to a new low price of $379 ($70 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart.  [Product: Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FDKQ2FG6?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FBose-QuietComfort-Ultra-Headphones-II-Bluetooth-Over-Ear-Noise-Cancelling-Headphones-Driftwood-Sand%2F17605916660, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fbose-quietcomfort-ultra-headphones-2nd-gen-black%2FJ7C5V6W7LP%2Fsku%2F6642778%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D%26ref%3D212%26loc%3DBoseHD%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D19716535611%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAD-ORIgCZw_CnJk10M8F1qjLLR4Dc%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw3K7RBhDJARIsAKRtP5SJyrABDYGXfJNISAcq26aFRMFPQHMnwmZKYEisnruApX3XVv_i-YcaAqsKEALw_wcB] The over-ears improve upon their predecessor with better noise cancellation and support for lossless audio over a USB-C cable, allowing you to enjoy higher-quality sound from compatible devices. Bose also added a new Cinema Mode that helps make movies and TV shows feel more immersive while making dialogue easier to hear, along with an improved transparency mode that surpasses the predecessor’s capabilities of reducing sudden loud noises. Battery life is better too, with the headphones lasting up to 30 hours on a single charge — a six-hour increase over the first-generation model.  Bose has also added a few other conveniences, including the ability to automatically enter a low-power standby mode when stored in the included case or laid flat. Plus, the headphones automatically power on and reconnect to a paired device when you put them on. At the same time, the new model retains soft ear cups and a comfortable, lightweight design that’s easy to wear for hours a time. Support for multipoint Bluetooth pairing remains as well, allowing you to stay connected to two devices simultaneously, so you can watch a video on your laptop and answer calls from your phone.
chineseTitle: Bose 最新款 QuietComfort Ultra 立减 70 美元，创下新低价格
chineseSummary: 如果您计划近期出行，Bose 第二代 QuietComfort Ultra 耳机是长途飞行和火车旅行的绝佳伴侣。它们不仅具有出色的降噪功能，而且还保留了前代产品的可折叠设计，使其易于随身携带。今天，他们更容易推荐，现在 [...]
chineseContent: 如果您计划近期出行，Bose 第二代 QuietComfort Ultra 耳机是长途飞行和火车旅行的绝佳伴侣。它们不仅具有出色的降噪功能，而且还保留了前代产品的可折叠设计，使其易于随身携带。现在，它们在亚马逊、百思买和沃尔玛的价格已降至 379 美元（折扣 70 美元）的新低，因此更容易推荐。  [产品：Bose QuietComfort Ultra 耳机（第二代）| https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FDKQ2FG6?tag=theverge02-20， https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FBose-QuietComfort-Ultra-Headphones-II-Bluetooth-Over-Ear-Noise-Cancelling-Headphones-Driftwood-Sand%2F17605916660， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fbose-quietcomfort-ul tra-耳机-第二代-黑色%2FJ7C5V6W7LP%2Fsku%2F6642778%3Futm_source%3Dfeed%26extStoreId%3D%26ref%3D212%26loc% 3DBoseHD%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D19716535611%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAD-ORIgCZw_CnJk10M8F1 qjLLR4Dc%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw3K7RBhDJARISAKRtP5SJyrABDYGXfJNIAcq26aFRMFPQHMnwmZKYEisnruApX3XVv_i-YcaAqsKEALw_wcB]这款耳罩式耳机在前代产品的基础上进行了改进，具有更好的降噪效果，并支持通过 USB-C 线缆传输无损音频，让您可以从兼容设备享受更高品质的声音。 Bose 还添加了新的影院模式，有助于让电影和电视节目感觉更加身临其境，同时使对话更容易听到，以及改进的透明度模式，超越了前代产品减少突然大声噪音的能力。电池续航时间也更长，耳机一次充电可持续使用长达 30 小时，比第一代耳机延长了 6 小时
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
